query: ("weather forecast" OR "weather forecasts" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "meteorological forecasts" OR "temperature forecast" OR "temperature forecasts" OR "heat forecast" OR "heat forecasts" OR "early warning system" OR "early warning systems" OR "heat warning" OR "heat warnings" OR "temperature alert" OR "temperature alerts" OR "heat advisory" OR "extreme heat warning") AND ("cooling center" OR "cooling centers" OR "cooling centre" OR "cooling centres" OR "heat shelter" OR "heat shelters" OR "cooling shelter" OR "cooling shelters" OR "climate refuge" OR "heat refuge" OR "emergency shelter" OR "emergency shelters" OR "public cooling" OR "air conditioning" OR "cooling intervention" OR "cooling interventions" OR "heat relief" OR "cooling program" OR "cooling programs" OR "misting station" OR "misting stations") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "temperature-health" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "extreme temperature" OR "extreme temperatures" OR "heatwave" OR "heatwaves" OR "heat wave" OR "heat waves" OR "heat exposure" OR "heat illness" OR "hyperthermia" OR "heat stroke") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "randomized controlled trials" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "natural experiments" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable" OR "instrumental variables" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "causal inference" OR "causal identification" OR "treatment effect" OR "treatment effects" OR "intervention study" OR "policy evaluation" OR "random assignment" OR "exogenous variation" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "mortality displacement" OR "health intervention" OR "health interventions" OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR "interrupted time series" OR "propensity score" OR "matching" OR "evaluation study")
